name: Alberta Banks Park
description: Come play pickleball at Alberta Banks Park in Flowery Branch, GA! There are 9 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and water.

name: Cresswind at Lake Lanier Community
description: Come play pickleball at Cresswind at Lake Lanier Community in Gainesville, GA! There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms and lights.
open_play_schedule: Please continue to  reserve your court for all other court times (excluding open play and league). Be courteous, inclusive, and helpful to one another. During open play, if people are waiting to play, invite them to rotate in after you have played one game. If the courts are full, tennis courts 2 and 3 are available if they are not being used. The courts are available from 7 am - 10 pm. Have fun and enjoy.

name: Del Webb Chateau Elan
description: Del Webb Chateau Elan is a place to play pickleball in Thompsons Mill, GA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Mulberry Creek Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Mulberry Creek Community Center in Flowery Branch, GA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and locker rooms.

name: North Hall Community Center
description:
Come play pickleball at North Hall
Community Center in Gainesville, GA!
There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Platt Park
description: Platt Park is a place to play pickleball in Gainesville, GA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Roper Park
description: Roper Park is a place to play pickleball in Gainesville, GA. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Sterling On the Lake
description: Sterling On the Lake is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Flowery Branch, GA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: University of North Georgia - Gainesville Campus
description: Come play pickleball at University of North Georgia - Gainesville Campus in Oakwood, GA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: Wessell Park
description: No bathrooms or lights at present
